en.title: Rust Subscription and Plan Component
en.summary: Backend component for plans, subscriptions and payment flows.
en.description: Built to integrate into SaaS systems and centralize plan management, checkout flow and webhooks.

es.summary: Componente backend para planes, suscripciones y flujo de pagos.

highlights: Flujo de cambio de plan basado en FSM
